charter: Derive and ship M25 from .planning/VISION.md and current product gaps. Favor a bounded static sensitive-field/redaction increment that improves tusq.manifest.json usefulness for real SaaS codebases while preserving local/offline deterministic behavior. PM must reconcile the M24 baseline as shipped, define exact scope and constraints, then route dev/QA/product-marketing through AgentXchain for real code, tests, docs, QA evidence, and launch artifacts.
acceptance_contract: M24 shipped status reconciled in planning artifacts if evidence supports it
PM derives a concrete bounded M25 increment from VISION.md around data/schema understanding or sensitive-field redaction
Implementation includes real code and fixtures/tests/evals/docs as appropriate
QA independently verifies acceptance and npm test
Launch artifacts updated to describe shipped boundary without overclaiming

history.reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval
operator recovery: supersession was incorrect for a fresh post-M24 M25 intent; existing planning artifacts are the baseline, not completion evidence for this new increment
